USER_STORY: As a device I can push pending operations
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: Pending operations become synced or failed

USER_STORY: As a device I can pull server changes
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: Client receives changes since last sync

USER_STORY: As the system I can retry failed sync
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: Retry count increases and no data is lost

USER_STORY: As the system I can avoid duplicate sync
